Class WebKeyCli

java.lang.Object
iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
public class WebKeyCli extends Object
CLI tool for generating and manipulating WebKeys.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) static final String
    USAGE
    CLI Usage Document, printed before stack trace if an error occurs.

    Returns a copy of a CA with a new signed certificate appended to the valid certificate store.

    Reads the X509 subject organization from environment IU_CRYPT_CLI_PKI_ORG or System property iu.crypt.cli.pki.org.

  • Field Details

    • USAGE

      static final String USAGE
      CLI Usage Document, printed before stack trace if an error occurs.

  • Method Details

    • parseSerial

      static BigInteger parseSerial(String serialNumber)
      Parses a serial number from hex format consistent with OpenSSL.
      Parameters:
      serialNumber - hex-encoded serial number
      Returns:
      parsed serial number, should match X509Certificate.getSerialNumber()

    • formatSerial

      static String formatSerial(BigInteger serialNumber)
      Formats a serial number as unpadded Base64 URL encoded.
      Parameters:
      serialNumber - from X509Certificate.getSerialNumber()
      Returns:
      hex-encoded serial number

    • formatSerialOSSL

      static String formatSerialOSSL(BigInteger serialNumber)
      Formats a serial number in hex format consistent with OpenSSL.
      Parameters:
      serialNumber - from X509Certificate.getSerialNumber()
      Returns:
      hex-encoded serial number

    • formatPki

      static String formatPki(int basicConstraints, boolean[] keyUsage)
      Formats X509 PKI extensions for a certificate
      Parameters:
      basicConstraints - basic constraints value
      keyUsage - key usage statement
      Returns:
      formatted description

    • print

      public static void print(PrintStream out, edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk)
      Prints human readable key metadata.
      Parameters:
      out - stream to print on
      jwk - key to print

    • print

      static void print(PrintStream out, edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority ca)
      Prints human readable CA metadata.
      Parameters:
      out - stream to print on
      ca - CA to print

    • create

      public static edu.iu.crypt.WebKey create(String[] arg)
      Generates a new key by arguments
      Parameters:
      arg - arguments
      Returns:
      generated key

    • export

      static void export(PrintStream out, edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk)
      Exports a PEM-encpded key and certificate data.
      Parameters:
      out - stream to print the certificate chain on
      jwk - key to output as PEM-encoded

    • export

      static void export(PrintStream out, edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority ca, BigInteger serial)
      Exports an PEM-encpded X509 certificate chain for a CA-signed cert.
      Parameters:
      out - stream to print the certificate chain on
      ca - CA to export the certificate from
      serial - serial number of certificate to export; null to export the full certificate chain.

    • cert

      static edu.iu.crypt.WebKey cert(edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk, Path certificateChainFile)
      Replaces the X509 certificate chain of a JWK.
      Parameters:
      jwk - JWK to update
      certificateChainFile - concatenated PEM-encoded certificate chain file
      Returns:
      Updated JWK

    • subjectOrg

      public static String subjectOrg()
      Reads the X509 subject organization from environment IU_CRYPT_CLI_PKI_ORG or System property iu.crypt.cli.pki.org.
      Returns:
      X509 subject organization

    • days

      public static int days()
      Gets the number of days self- and CA-signed certs are valid.
      Returns:
      Environment variable IU_CRYPT_CLI_PKI_DAYS, system property iu.crypt.cli.pki.days, or default of 120.

    • caDays

      public static int caDays()
      Gets the number of days a CA signing certificate will be valid.
      Returns:
      Environment variable IU_CRYPT_CLI_PKI_CA_DAYS, system property iu.crypt.cli.pki.ca.days, or default of 830.

    • self

      public static edu.iu.crypt.WebKey self(edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk)
      Adds a self-signed X509 certificate to the JWK.
      Parameters:
      jwk - JWK
      Returns:
      updated JWK

    • ca

      static edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority ca(edu.iu.crypt.WebKey pwk)
      Creates a new private CA.
      Parameters:
      pwk - CA signing key
      Returns:
      X509CertificateAuthority

    • req

      static void req(PrintStream out, edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk)
      Generates a new certificate request.
      Parameters:
      out - stream to print the CSR on
      jwk - key to generate a CSR for

    • sign

      static edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority sign(edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority ca, Path csrFile)
      Returns a copy of a CA with a new signed certificate appended to the valid certificate store.
      Parameters:
      ca - CA
      csrFile - Path to a valid certificate signing request
      Returns:
      Updated X509CertificateAuthority

    • revoke

      static edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority revoke(edu.iu.crypt.X509CertificateAuthority ca, BigInteger serial)
      Returns a copy of a CA with a certificate revoked.
      Parameters:
      ca - CA to revoke the certificate from
      serial - serial number of the certificate to revoke
      Returns:
      Updated CA

    • main

      public static void main(String[] arg)
      Main entry point.
      Parameters:
      arg - arguments
